title: Has anyone found a way to display the full month in a column?
excerpt:
I have seen some old posts about this topic but no resolution yet.  I am trying to display the full month, such as January instead of Jan, but it currently doesnt have that option.  Anyone find a workaround? 
Thank you i…

posts.author: apineqca (andrew pine)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have seen some old posts about this topic but no resolution yet. I am trying to display the full month, such as January instead of Jan, but it currently doesnt have that option. Anyone find a workaround?

Thank you in advance.
